description.text: Find out what chaos unfolds when two groups of Heroes board the same ship. Created by sanojLeOne. Two Cubes and a Base.

es.original: Find out what chaos unfolds when two groups of Heroes board the same ship. Created by sanojLeOne. Two Cubes and a Base.
es.translation:
Dos grupos rivales a bordo del mismo barco significa caos. Autor: sanojLeOne.
Dos generadores y un núcleo.

pt.original: Find out what chaos unfolds when two groups of Heroes board the same ship. Created by sanojLeOne. Two Cubes and a Base.
pt.translation: Descubra a confusão que acontece quando dois grupos de heróis entram no mesmo navio. Criado por sanojLeOne. Dois Cubos e uma Base.

de.original: Find out what chaos unfolds when two groups of Heroes board the same ship. Created by sanojLeOne. Two Cubes and a Base.
de.translation: Was für ein Chaos gibt es wohl, wenn zwei Teams dasselbe Schiff einnehmen? Von sanojLeOne. Zwei Generatoren und eine Basis.

ru.original: Find out what chaos unfolds when two groups of Heroes board the same ship. Created by sanojLeOne. Two Cubes and a Base.
ru.translation: Узнай, какой начнется хаос, когда две группы героев окажутся на одном корабле. Создано sanojLeOne. Два куба и база.

fr.original: Find out what chaos unfolds when two groups of Heroes board the same ship. Created by sanojLeOne. Two Cubes and a Base.
fr.translation: Quand deux groupes de héros embarquent à bord du même paquebot, vous pouvez être sur que la croisière va s'amuser... Créée par sanojLeOne. Deux cubes et une base.
